summary: Completed comprehensive frontend UI testing of OrthoConnect platform. All requested features are working correctly including Homepage hero section, search bar with auto-suggest (Hindi support), radius controls, Education Hub with softer color gradients, Education Category with search filter, Education Topic with research-backed content, breadcrumb navigation, mobile responsiveness, and ethical messaging throughout.
passed_tests: Homepage Hero section - title 'Find Trusted Orthopaedic Care', subtitle, badge 'India's Ethical Orthopaedic Platform'
Homepage Search bar - Smart search with placeholder 'Try: knee specialist near 500001 or ACL tear treatment'
Homepage Near Me button - Working with geolocation support
Homepage Radius controls - 5km, 10km, 25km, 50km buttons with active state styling
Homepage Popular searches - Knee Pain, Shoulder Injury, Spine Problems, Sports Injury, Joint Replacement, Fracture Care
Homepage Trust bar - 'No advertisements, No paid rankings, Free surgeon profiles, Patient-first platform'
Homepage Stats section - 700+ Educational Topics, 11 Specialties Covered, 100% Free for Surgeons, 0 Paid Listings
Homepage Know Your Condition section - 6 category cards with softer color gradients (400 shade)
Homepage Red Flags section - 4 urgent care warning items
Homepage Non-Surgical Care section - Physiotherapy, Bracing & Supports, Pain Management cards
Homepage CTA section - 'Are you an Orthopaedic Surgeon?' with 'Create Your Free Profile' button
Search auto-suggest dropdown - Shows suggestions when typing 'knee' including Hindi support (घुटने का दर्द)
Education Hub page - 11 category cards with softer color gradients, 700+ Topics badge, disclaimer
Education Category page (Knee & Sports) - 61 topics, search filter working, topic links

Education Topic page (ACL Tear) - Research-backed content badge, Key Takeaways, What is it section, Symptoms, Causes & Risk Factors, Treatment Options (Non-Surgical/Surgical), Recovery & Rehabilitation, Prevention, References
Education Topic sidebar - When to Seek Urgent Care, Find a Specialist search, Medical Disclaimer
Breadcrumb navigation - Education > Knee & Sports > ACL Tear - all links working
Site Header - Logo 'OrthoConnect', navigation links (Patient Education, About, Contact), 'Join as Surgeon' button
Site Footer - Quick Links, Disclaimer, 'No ads • No rankings • Patient-first' messaging
Mobile responsiveness - Mobile menu toggle, mobile navigation, responsive layouts
Join as Surgeon page - Mobile input, Send OTP button, footer with ethical messaging
